{{Infobox group
| name = Galactic Union
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Galactic Union Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Galactic [[Union]] is a massive interplanetary government and one of the four major powers in the civilized galaxy. Its territory encompasses human space, the [[Aethril]], and the [[Dornoth system]], including its surrounding sector. The [[Union]] is characterized by a highly active network of colonies, stations, and ships, with its headquarters located in the [[Fathom system]]. This central hub is also considered the birthplace of humanity and serves as a vital center for the galaxy's magical community, where millions of mages undergo training to become Tower-certified wizards. The [[Union]] maintains a vast presence through its fleet, which utilizes gray ships and large battlegroups to project power and maintain security. While some view the [[Union]] as a necessary shield for protecting innocent lives and maintaining galactic stability, others see it as an aggressive force that has pursued dominance through civil war and the suppression of freedom. The organization is reportedly controlled by a shadow group known as [[Solstice]], which operates from the [[Fathom system]] and manipulates [[Union]] affairs to further its own goals. This influence has led to accusations that the [[Union]] uses magic and secret operations to root out dissent and engineer chaos. Despite its role in providing intelligence and maintaining infrastructure like recycling colonies, the [[Union]] has also been known to deny entry to certain individuals and engage in conflict with other factions like the [[Karoshan Alliance]] or the [[Iron Legion]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Galactic [[Union]] is the largest interplanetary government in civilized space, a political entity led by [[President Vashei]] that maintains a generic corporate appearance. This space-faring organization certifies Archmages, operates destroyers and battleships, and utilizes soldiers, operational squads, and appointed investigation teams to enforce its laws. While the [[Union]] has achieved victories in the [[Evven-Fahr system]] and subdued the [[Hive]], it currently faces an invasion by the [[Iron Legion]] and incursions from the [[Hives]]. Despite being controlled by a secret organization, the [[Union]] refuses to bow to threats even as the [[Iron King]] pushes into its territory and [[Varic Vallenar]] is placed on its execution list.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] certifies Archmages.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is the largest interplanetary government in civilized space.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union fleet]] controls one half of the divided system.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is an organization where a woman [[Varic]] knows is currently fighting the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has a fleet in the system.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has troops that subdued the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] achieved a victory in the [[Evven-Fahr system]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is a political entity.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has laws that the narrator's ship recommends not defying.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is a space-faring organization that the narrator has left.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has a generic corporate appearance.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] operates destroyers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist is aboard a [[Galactic Union]] battleship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has soldiers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has operational squads.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Galactic Union]] colonies are giant metal wheels with people crammed inside.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is a political entity that can declare individuals traitors.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has an investigation team.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] appoints investigators for incidents.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] provides reports to [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] warns of sudden movements from the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] has territory that the ship is skirting.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is represented by military officers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] is focusing on the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] does not bow to threats.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] is on the [[Galactic Union]]'s execution list.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is being invaded by the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] is pushing into [[Galactic Union]] territory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is a political entity that [[President Vashei]] led.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Hives]] are pushing into [[Galactic Union]] territory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Lagomorph commandos wear armor resembling [[Galactic Union]] battle-armor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c46">''The Captain'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] is controlled by a secret organization.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|As one of the four corners of the galaxy, the Galactic [[Union]] is a centralized political entity with [[Fathom]] at its heart and a President in leadership. While its colonies are defined by floating rings of gray metal, the organization's control over space in the [[Thevellian System]] is nominal and its vast territories remain sparsely populated. Although it possesses dreadnoughts and has permitted mixed fleets into its territory, the [[Union]] is actually controlled by the shadow organization [[Solstice]]. During various conflicts, the [[Union]]'s ships have been destroyed or pushed into enemy lines, yet the governing body refuses to recognize spoils of war under galactic law. The entity's influence eventually faced a terminal decline when the Advocates decapitated it.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Galactic Union]] colonies are characterized by rings of gray metal floating in space.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] has space that is nominally held but sparsely populated.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Doctor Mell]] was located in [[Galactic Union]] space when she was captured.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is controlled by the shadow organization [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is a political entity with a President.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The students are leaving the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is a political entity that does not recognize spoils of war in galactic law.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] refuses to take the [[Captain]]'s calls.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] possesses dreadnoughts.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] permitted the mixed fleet into their territory.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is one of the four corners of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is a governing body that controls space in the [[Thevellian System]] in name only.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35">''The Engineer'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is an organization with ships that were destroyed in the chapter.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] has ships that can explode.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Galactic Union]] battlegroup pushed into the narrator's lines.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] decapitated the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Galactic Union]] is a centralized galactic entity with [[Fathom]] at its heart.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Galactic [[Union]] is a hostile entity that maintains military outposts and provides support to [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]]. Historically, the group performed a takeover that forced splinter factions to flee into [[Dark Space]], and they once assembled a fleet alongside the [[Starhammer]] and [[Karoshan Alliance]] to kill the narrator. The [[Union]] utilizes magic to eliminate those who question their policies and has placed bounties on both the narrator and [[Mell]]. During a confrontation, they held up the narrator, though the crew retains the ability to inform them of certain developments. Ultimately, the team must prevent this organization from obtaining [[Zenith]] technology.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Galactic Union]] soldiers share horror stories about [[Karoshan]] soldiers.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] maintains a military outpost.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] has placed a bounty on the narrator and [[Mell]]'s heads.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] has used magic to root out those who question their policies.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] is an entity that the team must not allow to have [[Zenith]] technology.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] previously cobbled together a fleet with the [[Karoshan Alliance]] and [[Starhammer]] to kill the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] held up the narrator during a conversation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] once performed a takeover that resulted in splinter factions fleeing to [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] is a group that provides support to [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c19">''The Knight'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The crew can inform the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Galactic Union]] is described as hostile.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Galactic [[Union]] is a group of influential leaders aiming for unity, though the entity is secretly controlled by [[Solstice]] and a criminal organization. This resource-rich group includes institutions like the [[Magic Tower]] and maintains defense satellites, military forces for [[Void Prism]], and a capital located at [[Fathom]]. Tensions rose as the [[Union]] became enemies with the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] and faced a declaration of war from the [[Zenith]] Starship, eventually instigating a civil war that split the galaxy in half. Despite being able to summon reinforcements from across the galaxy, the [[Union]] faced internal corruption and the assassination of its president by [[Omega]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is a group of influential leaders.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is an entity that [[Universal Manufacturing]] aims to influence.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is controlled by a criminal organization.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] is an institution of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Taking materials from the [[Grand Hive]] without starting a war with the [[Galactic Union]] is impractical.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] aims for unity.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] fighting for the [[Galactic Union]] would help [[Solstice]] convince the galaxy they are on their side.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prism]] and [[Divide]] are cooperating with the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is a group containing many resources.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Captain]] threatens to go to war with the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A heavily armored [[Galactic Union]] cargo ship emerges from [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] has military forces at the disposal of [[Void Prism]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] has defense satellites used to destroy invading starships.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Galactic Union]] ships were retreating from the enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Zenith Starship]] declared war on the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is in a state of tension with the [[Alliance]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] allowed the militia to rush to their deaths.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] occupied the ruins of a former docking hangar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is attempting to trap [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] can pick up reinforcements from almost anywhere in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] was unable to reach [[Leilari]] or [[Starhammer]]'s connections.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] is an entity that the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] has made enemies with.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] experiences instances of corruption that can be traced back to [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c33">''The Pilot'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]]'s magical community is assumed to be with the enemy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Lichborn]] home world is in an important position in the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] has ongoing engagements with the [[Iron Legion]] along its border with [[Dark Space]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] instigated a civil war that tore the galaxy in half.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] has an underbelly with contacts.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41">''The Pilot'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lutoch]] possesses a [[Galactic Union]] ID.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] controls the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] assassinated the [[Galactic Union]] president.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Galactic Union]] would set its sights on the [[Karoshan Alliance]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom]] is the capital of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“If anyone knew where you were, you’d be facing down the barrels of a Galactic Union dreadnought.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Six weeks later, you and the Advocates decapitated the Galactic Union.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“For the unity of the Galactic Union, your people always said.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I’ll go to war with the Galactic Union,” I said, still addressing the camera.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The Zenith Starship declares war on the Galactic Union!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
